spanish: Salgo de la cárcel con la misma determinación con la que entré.
english: I leave prison with the same determination with which I entered.
explanation: Relative clause with 'con la que' - establishes comparison between past and present state using relative pronoun

spanish: Si es declarado culpable, podría ser condenado a años de prisión.
english: If he is found guilty, he could be sentenced to years in prison.
explanation: Conditional clause with 'si' + passive voice 'es declarado', followed by conditional 'podría ser condenado'

spanish: Sostiene que el caso criminaliza el periodismo y se pregunta cómo podrán los reporteros seguir haciendo su trabajo.
english: He maintains that the case criminalizes journalism and wonders how reporters will be able to continue doing their work.
explanation: Present indicative 'sostiene' with subordinate clauses, followed by indirect question with future 'podrán'
